docs.title: Autonomy
docs.text:
Advanced Utility bot

designed to be user friendly, without sacraficing customizability

docs.title: Setup
docs.text:
Warning Autonomy's documentation is still a work in progress

Checkout the Setup guide to learn how to Setup Autonomy

docs.title: Database
docs.text:
Autonomy uses SQLite to store data like the config for your servers

Autonomy also has a range of Database commands

These Database commands are for developers only and are protected by a developer key

Database commands are planned to be phased out along with developer keys

Learn more about developer keys

docs.title: Autonomy's dataset
docs.text:
Autonomy has a dataset of scam images etc

early versions of this dataset are freely exposed in early github commits

newer more advanced versions of this dataset are private

docs.title: Why are they private?
docs.text:
To protect Autonomy's dataset from being stolen it has been made private

People self hosting Autonomy do not get access to this dataset, but are free to use early versions

docs.title: Developer keys
docs.text: Developer keys are planned to be phased out in the future

docs.title: What are developer keys?
docs.text: Developer keys are keys stored in the bots database, they are only given out to trusted developers

docs.title: What do developer keys do?
docs.text:
Developer keys allow anyone with the key to modify certain things about the bot,

For example a developer key means you can edit parts of the database.

Developer keys are meant for quick fixes or quickly helping a user Developer keys are often changed quickly after use

docs.title: How do I get my own developer key?
docs.text:
Developer keys are not just given out, they require years of trust

Their is no single way to get a developer key, they are only given out in rare cases

docs.title: What developer keys DO NOT DO
docs.text: Developer keys DO NOT: Allow people to attack your server Give people full control over the bot Give access to personal infomation Give access to directly modify Autonomy's code

docs.title: Setup
docs.text:
Autonomy is now in a public beta! Add Autonomy

Click the link above to add Autonomy

docs.title: Terms and Conditions

Welcome to Autoonomy!

These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of Autonomy's Website, located at boneheadbreaker.github.io/Autonomy/.

To the extent permitted by applicable laws, Autonomy shall not be liable for the Comments or for any liability, damages or expenses caused and/or suffered as a result of any use of and/or posting of and/or appearance of the Comments on this website.

Autonomy reserves the right to monitor all Comments and to remove any Comments which can be considered inappropriate, offensive or causes breach of these Terms and Conditions.

Government agencies; Search engines; News organizations; Online directory distributors may link to our Website in the same manner as they hyperlink to the Websites of other listed businesses; and System wide Accredited Businesses except soliciting non-profit organizations, charity shopping malls, and charity fundraising groups which may not hyperlink to our Web site. We may consider and approve other link requests from the following types of organizations:

commonly-known consumer and/or business information sources; dot.com community sites; associations or other groups representing charities; online directory distributors; internet portals; accounting, law and consulting firms; and educational institutions and trade associations. We will approve link requests from these organizations if we decide that: (a) the link would not make us look unfavorably to ourselves or to our accredited businesses; (b) the organization does not have any negative records with us; (c) the benefit to us from the visibility of the hyperlink compensates the absence of Autonomy; and (d) the link is in the context of general resource information.

These organizations may link to our home page so long as the link: (a) is not in any way deceptive; (b) does not falsely imply sponsorship, endorsement or approval of the linking party and its products or services; and (c) fits within the context of the linking party's site.

If you are one of the organizations listed in paragraph 2 above and are interested in linking to our website, you must inform us by sending an e-mail to Autonomy. Please include your name, your organization name, contact information as well as the URL of your site, a list of any URLs from which you intend to link to our Website, and a list of the URLs on our site to which you would like to link. Wait 2-3 weeks for a response.

Approved organizations may hyperlink to our Website as follows:

By use of our corporate name; or By use of the uniform resource locator being linked to; or By use of any other description of our Website being linked to that makes sense within the context and format of content on the linking party's site. No use of Autonomy's logo or other artwork will be allowed for linking absent a trademark license agreement.

iFrames

Without prior approval and written permission, you may not create frames around our Webpages that alter in any way the visual presentation or appearance of our Website.

Content Liability

We shall not be hold responsible for any content that appears on your Website. You agree to protect and defend us against all claims that is rising on your Website. No link(s) should appear on any Website that may be interpreted as libelous, obscene or criminal, or which infringes, otherwise violates, or advocates the infringement or other violation of, any third party rights.

Reservation of Rights

We reserve the right to request that you remove all links or any particular link to our Website. You approve to immediately remove all links to our Website upon request. We also reserve the right to amen these terms and conditions and it's linking policy at any time. By continuously linking to our Website, you agree to be bound to and follow these linking terms and conditions.

Removal of links from our website

If you find any link on our Website that is offensive for any reason, you are free to contact and inform us any moment. We will consider requests to remove links but we are not obligated to or so or to respond to you directly.

We do not ensure that the information on this website is correct, we do not warrant its completeness or accuracy; nor do we promise to ensure that the website remains available or that the material on the website is kept up to date.
